name: Conflict Scenario -Ambiguous Root Cause (Deploy + Load Spike)
description: ap-south-1 video-streaming during ICC Champions Trophy. Deploy v2.3.1 landed at 14:02, but traffic was already spiking from 14:00 due to the cricket match. Error rates are high (12.4%), latency is 10x normal. 6 unhealthy instances, CDN cache hit rate collapsed. Root Cause Agent will blame the deployment; Capacity Agent will blame the load spike. The 2-minute overlap makes this genuinely ambiguous -the Incident Commander must mediate.

expected_outcome.notes: This is the demo centerpiece. The reconciliation loop should fire at least once. Both hypotheses have legitimate evidence.
